comment: Pinned vendor dependency versions. Edit manually for major bumps; use update-vendor.sh for patch/minor updates.

notes.react + react-dom: Must stay in sync; Excalidraw requires React 18 — do not bump to 19 until Excalidraw supports it.
notes.pdfjs-dist: Pinned to exact version; worker and main module must match exactly.
notes.bpmn-js: Major bumps often include breaking API changes in the modeler.
notes.mermaid: v10→v11 had rendering engine changes; test diagrams after major bump.
notes.monaco-editor: Major bumps can change loader API or language service behavior.
